title: Implement authenticated optimizer state loading in ProcedureTask
description: Replace apiKey GraphQL + /api/procedure-state proxy path with authenticated Amplify GraphQL and Amplify Storage downloadData for procedures/* state in ProcedureTask.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started implementation. Plan: remove apiKey mode and proxy route from ProcedureTask optimizer state fetch, load offloaded state using Amplify Storage downloadData from reportBlockDetails/procedures/*, update storage access rules, add/adjust unit tests for no proxy usage and no apiKey auth mode.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented changes on branch bugfix/procedures-optimizer-authenticated-amplify:
- ProcedureTask metadata fetch no longer sets authMode=apiKey
- ProcedureTask now hydrates _s3_key state via Amplify Storage downloadData from reportBlockDetails bucket
- Added procedures/* authenticated storage access rule
- Removed Next API proxy route /api/procedure-state/[id]
- Added regression test components/__tests__/ProcedureTask.optimizer-auth.test.tsx covering no apiKey/no proxy and S3-key hydration path

Validation:
- PASS: npm test -- --runInBand components/__tests__/ProcedureTask.optimizer-auth.test.tsx
- BLOCKED ENV: npm run typecheck did not complete in this environment after extended runtime
- BLOCKED ENV: npx eslint ... failed with repo/toolchain AJV/ESLint initialization error unrelated to this change
